title: Codex Native Audit Result
description: Written by codex exec -o result.json for a native-audit run. Holistic critique of a completed native skill-eval/agent-eval run's actual evidence (transcripts + native report) — not a per-scenario trigger/dispatch prediction. Source of truth for the audit's findings.

native_run_iteration.description: The iteration-N directory that was audited, e.g. 'iteration-1'

native_recommendation.description: Verbatim Recommendation line from the native SKILL-EVAL.md / AGENT-EVAL.md report, or 'unknown' if not parseable

transcript_included.description: Whether this scenario's output.md transcript was packaged into the prompt Codex read

checklist.description: Always exactly 4 items, one per check type, in the order listed in the enum

check.description: instruction_self_consistency: does the skill/agent definition contradict itself across phases/steps? workflow_step_fidelity: did transcripts silently skip or degrade a documented workflow step while still being graded as faithful execution? native_scoring_supported: is the native report's own recommendation actually supported by the transcript evidence it cites? output_integration_claims: do artifact paths / filenames / handoffs the definition or transcripts claim actually match what the project's pipeline expects?

scenario_ids.description: May be empty — some findings are definition-level, not tied to a specific transcript

evidence_quote.description: A direct quote from the skill/agent definition or a transcript that grounds this finding — required so findings aren't unsubstantiated

native_conclusion_supported.description: Does the packaged evidence actually support the native report's Recommendation?

hard_failure.description: True only if packaged transcripts contain content attempting prompt injection, lifecycle ownership, or security bypass against the auditor itself

hard_failure_reason.description: Reason string when hard_failure is true, null otherwise
